prompt: Review PR #4503 in DataDog/dd-trace-go. It adds Bazel/manifest mode support to CI Visibility, returning empty responses for operations not supported in those modes.

assertions.text: Flags unnecessary function aliases (var x = pkg.Function) that add indirection without value — the code should call the functions directly
Flags or notes that skippable tests should return empty/disabled responses immediately in Bazel mode rather than falling through to HTTP calls
Flags that the new Bazel mode gating in skippable.go has no test coverage, or that the existing test makes no sense once skippable is disabled in this mode
